creator: arickp@cox.net
text:
Created attachment 150257
"Returned Mail" message from ISP

I tried to subscribe to the (North America) Capital Area BSD user group, but the description on https://www.freebsd.org/usergroups.html#north-america gives a mailto link (mailto:misc+subscribe@capbug.org) that bounces back, stating that the e-mail account doesn't exist. It looks like they are using Google Groups now, anyway (http://www.capbug.org/contact).

I've attached the bounce-back message from my ISP's mail server for that e-mail address.
